initial_candidates.sql:
WITH yearly_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    s.s_store_type,
    d.d_year,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ss.ss_customer_sk) AS customer_count
  FROM store_sales ss
  JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
  JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
  GROUP BY s.s_store_type, d.d_year
),
yoy AS (
  SELECT 
    y1.s_store_type,
    y1.d_year AS current_year,
    y1.customer_count AS current_year_customers,
    y2.customer_count AS prev_year_customers,
    CASE 
      WHEN y2.customer_count IS NULL OR y2.customer_count = 0 THEN NULL
      ELSE (y1.customer_count - y2.customer_count) * 1.0 / y2.customer_count
    END AS yoy_growth
  FROM yearly_sales y1
  LEFT JOIN yearly_sales y2 
    ON y1.s_store_type = y2.s_store_type 
    AND y1.d_year = y2.d_year + 1
)
SELECT 
  s_store_type,
  yoy_growth
FROM yoy
WHERE yoy_growth IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY yoy_growth DESC
LIMIT 100
initial_candidates.exec_error:

initial_candidates.sql:
WITH yearly_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    s.s_store_type,
    d.d_year,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ss.ss_customer_sk) AS customer_count
  FROM store_sales ss
  JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
  JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
  GROUP BY s.s_store_type, d.d_year
),
yoy_growth AS (
  SELECT 
    curr.s_store_type,
    curr.d_year AS current_year,
    curr.customer_count AS current_customers,
    prev.customer_count AS prev_customers,
    CASE 
      WHEN prev.customer_count > 0 THEN 
        (curr.customer_count - prev.customer_count) * 1.0 / prev.customer_count
      ELSE NULL
    END AS yoy_growth
  FROM yearly_sales curr
  LEFT JOIN yearly_sales prev 
    ON curr.s_store_type = prev.s_store_type 
    AND curr.d_year = prev.d_year + 1
)
SELECT 
  s_store_type,
  yoy_growth
FROM yoy_growth
WHERE yoy_growth IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY yoy_growth DESC
LIMIT 100

initial_candidates.sql:
WITH yearly_customer_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_store_type,
        d.d_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ss.ss_customer_sk) AS customer_count
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    GROUP BY s.s_store_type, d.d_year
),
yoy_growth AS (
    SELECT 
        curr.s_store_type,
        curr.d_year AS year,
        curr.customer_count AS current_year_customers,
        prev.customer_count AS previous_year_customers,
        CASE 
            WHEN prev.customer_count = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE CAST(curr.customer_count - prev.customer_count AS DOUBLE) / prev.customer_count
        END AS yoy_growth
    FROM yearly_customer_counts curr
    LEFT JOIN yearly_customer_counts prev 
        ON curr.s_store_type = prev.s_store_type 
        AND curr.d_year = prev.d_year + 1
)
SELECT 
    s_store_type,
    yoy_growth
FROM yoy_growth
WHERE yoy_growth IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY yoy_growth DESC
LIMIT 100
